case_title: ARTRA FLEMING VS. PHOENIX ELECTRIC COMPANY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,484.32 FILED BY FLEMING, ARTRA AS TO DEFENDANT PHOENIX ELECTRIC COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-24-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED SEP-24-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT PHOENIX ELECTRIC COMPANY
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT PHOENIX ELECTRIC COMPANY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-24-2008 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-02-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-24-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-24-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FLEMING, ARTRA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PHOENIX ELECTRIC COMPANY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
